{{Scorpio}}

Scorpio is the 12th month of the [[Gaian calendar]]. It contains 28 days (4 weeks) and corresponds to ISO weeks 45–48.

== Overview ==
===Etymology===
English ''Scorpio/Scorpius'' "scorpion" (Latin/Greek). Japanese: {{ill|蠍座|ja|Sasori-za}} “scorpion-constellation.”  
===Gaiad themes===
Weeks 45–48 (Days [[Scorpio 1]]–[[Scorpio 28]]):   
===EVENTS===
* [[Scorpio 14]] — [[:Category:Days_that_Shichi-Go-San_falls_on|Shichi-Go-San]]  
* [[Scorpio 18]] — US Thanksgiving  
* [[Scorpio 21]] — End of WWII; [[:Category:Days_that_Niiname-sai_(新嘗祭)_falls_on|Niiname-sai]] (official day)  
* [[Scorpio 25]] — US Thanksgiving

==REFERENCES==
[[Category:Gaian calendar months]]

== Gregorian date ranges (±10 years) ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gaian Year !! Start Date !! End Date !! Gregorian Years
|-
| 12016 || 2016-11-07 || 2016-12-04 || 2016
|-
| 12017 || 2017-11-06 || 2017-12-03 || 2017
|-
| 12018 || 2018-11-05 || 2018-12-02 || 2018
|-
| 12019 || 2019-11-04 || 2019-12-01 || 2019
|-
| 12020 || 2020-11-02 || 2020-11-29 || 2020
|-
| 12021 || 2021-11-08 || 2021-12-05 || 2021
|-
| 12022 || 2022-11-07 || 2022-12-04 || 2022
|-
| 12023 || 2023-11-06 || 2023-12-03 || 2023
|-
| 12024 || 2024-11-04 || 2024-12-01 || 2024
|-
| 12025 || 2025-11-03 || 2025-11-30 || 2025
|-
| 12026 || 2026-11-02 || 2026-11-29 || 2026
|-
| 12027 || 2027-11-08 || 2027-12-05 || 2027
|-
| 12028 || 2028-11-06 || 2028-12-03 || 2028
|-
| 12029 || 2029-11-05 || 2029-12-02 || 2029
|-
| 12030 || 2030-11-04 || 2030-12-01 || 2030
|-
| 12031 || 2031-11-03 || 2031-11-30 || 2031
|-
| 12032 || 2032-11-01 || 2032-11-28 || 2032
|-
| 12033 || 2033-11-07 || 2033-12-04 || 2033
|-
| 12034 || 2034-11-06 || 2034-12-03 || 2034
|-
| 12035 || 2035-11-05 || 2035-12-02 || 2035
|-
| 12036 || 2036-11-03 || 2036-11-30 || 2036
|}

== Days in Scorpio ==
{| class="wikitable"
! Day !! Link
|-
| 1 || [[Scorpio 1]]
|-
| 2 || [[Scorpio 2]]
|-
| 3 || [[Scorpio 3]]
|-
| 4 || [[Scorpio 4]]
|-
| 5 || [[Scorpio 5]]
|-
| 6 || [[Scorpio 6]]
|-
| 7 || [[Scorpio 7]]
|-
| 8 || [[Scorpio 8]]
|-
| 9 || [[Scorpio 9]]
|-
| 10 || [[Scorpio 10]]
|-
| 11 || [[Scorpio 11]]
|-
| 12 || [[Scorpio 12]]
|-
| 13 || [[Scorpio 13]]
|-
| 14 || [[Scorpio 14]]
|-
| 15 || [[Scorpio 15]]
|-
| 16 || [[Scorpio 16]]
|-
| 17 || [[Scorpio 17]]
|-
| 18 || [[Scorpio 18]]
|-
| 19 || [[Scorpio 19]]
|-
| 20 || [[Scorpio 20]]
|-
| 21 || [[Scorpio 21]]
|-
| 22 || [[Scorpio 22]]
|-
| 23 || [[Scorpio 23]]
|-
| 24 || [[Scorpio 24]]
|-
| 25 || [[Scorpio 25]]
|-
| 26 || [[Scorpio 26]]
|-
| 27 || [[Scorpio 27]]
|-
| 28 || [[Scorpio 28]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Libra]] (previous month)
* [[Ophiuchus]] (next month)
* [[Gaian calendar]]

[[Category:Gaian calendar months|12]]

{{Gaian calendar}}
